name: Vinegar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the sugar and flour.
2. Gradually add the vinegar, butter, and beaten eggs to the dry ingredients.
3. Slowly incorporate cold water until the mixture is smooth.
4. Place the batter in a saucepan over low heat.
5. Cook the mixture until it thickens.
6. Pour the filling into a prepared pie crust.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) until the crust turns brown.
